chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 645 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5885/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.5886/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.10.2025 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency is allowed; however, learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, finally required the present application to be disposed of reserving the applicant’s right to seek redressal of his grievance of abuse of concession of bail before the learned trial Court. Accordingly, matter stands disposed of as not pressed along with pending application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
